heading: National Academy of Sciences: report
label: 1331 National Academy of Sciences: report
text: In addition to the usual number of the report of the National Academy of Sciences, two thousand copies shall be printed: five hundred for the Senate, one thousand for the House of Representatives, and five hundred for distribution by the National Academy of Sciences.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 275 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 7328 Stat. 616
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 275 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 7328 Stat. 616
